# Mats Tyldum

> Technology Leader at Sparebanken Norge. Based in Bergen, Norway.

Mats Tyldum is a technology leader with a developer background who enjoys combining leadership and technical work.

## CV

- [CV (English)](https://tyldum.dev/en/cv): Full CV with work experience, education, and skills
- [CV (Norwegian)](https://tyldum.dev/no/cv): Full CV in Norwegian

## Contact & Profiles

- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mtyldum/): LinkedIn profile
- [GitHub](https://github.com/maattss): GitHub profile

## Experience

- Technology Leader at Sparebanken Norge (2024 - Present): Leading a larger team responsible for developing and maintaining the bank's payment services.
- Team Lead & Developer at Sparebanken Vest (2022 - 2024): Team lead and developer in a team responsible for the bank's payment services.
- Developer at Bouvet (2019 - 2022): Developer. Consulting engagement at Equinor, 2021-2022. Part-time alongside studies, 2019-2021.
- IT Internship at ConocoPhillips (2018): Developed a solution for extracting, structuring, and visualizing well data.
- Teaching Assistant at University of Stavanger (2018): Teaching assistant in object-oriented programming, computer architecture, and algorithms & data structures.

## Education

- MSc in Computer Science, NTNU (2019 - 2021): Specialization in software development.
- BSc in Computer Science, University of Stavanger (2017 - 2019)
- BSc in Petroleum Engineering, University of Stavanger (2014 - 2017): Specialization in reservoir technology. Exchange semester at the University of Adelaide, fall 2016.

## Skills

- Frontend: React, TypeScript, Next.js
- Backend: .NET, C#, REST/OpenAPI, MongoDB
- Cloud & DevOps: Azure, Kubernetes, Docker, GitHub Actions
- Leadership: Team Leadership, Technical Roadmapping, Technical Architecture
